_comment: AXM Genesis v1 Merkle vectors (spec/v1/SPECIFICATION.md section 8). leaf = BLAKE3(0x00 || relpath_utf8 || 0x00 || file_bytes); node = BLAKE3(0x01 || left || right); the odd node is promoted unchanged (RFC 6962); empty root = BLAKE3(0x01). Covered files: every regular file under the shard root except manifest.json and sig/**, sorted by the UTF-8 bytes of the POSIX relative path. The legacy duplicate-odd-leaf construction is deleted and MUST NOT be implemented.

leaves.comment: an empty file still produces a leaf (the leaf commits to the path)
the relpath is hashed as UTF-8 bytes

trees.name: single_file
trees.comment: one leaf: the root IS the leaf hash (RFC 6962 promotion)

trees.name: three_files_odd_promotion
trees.comment: the odd leaf is promoted UNCHANGED, never duplicated: root = node(node(a,b), c)

trees.name: path_sort_is_bytewise
trees.comment: 'Z' (0x5A) sorts before 'a' (0x61) in UTF-8 byte order
